title: senecio cuneatus
intro: Senecio cuneatus, also known as Arrowhead or Narrow-leafed Ragwort, is a plant species native to New Zealand and southern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory issues. Senecio cuneatus is often prepared for herbal use by making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
